property.name: testRegisterUser
property.value: InsuranceClaimsProcessingSystemApplicationTests should register a new user successfully

property.name: testLoginUser
property.value: InsuranceClaimsProcessingSystemApplicationTests should login user with valid credentials

property.name: testLoginWithWrongUsernameOrPassword
property.value: InsuranceClaimsProcessingSystemApplicationTests should reject login with invalid username or password

property.name: testPolicyHolderShouldSubmitClaim
property.value: InsuranceClaimsProcessingSystemApplicationTests should allow policyholder to submit a claim

property.name: testPolicyHolderShouldGetClaims
property.value: InsuranceClaimsProcessingSystemApplicationTests should allow policyholder to retrieve all claims

property.name: testAdjusterShouldUpdateClaim
property.value: InsuranceClaimsProcessingSystemApplicationTests should allow adjuster to update a claim

property.name: testAdjusterShouldGetAllClaims
property.value: InsuranceClaimsProcessingSystemApplicationTests should allow adjuster to retrieve all claims

property.name: testAdjusterShouldAssignClaimToUnderwriter
property.value: InsuranceClaimsProcessingSystemApplicationTests should allow adjuster to assign a claim to an underwriter

property.name: testInvestigatorShouldCreateInvestigation
property.value: InsuranceClaimsProcessingSystemApplicationTests should allow investigator to create an investigation

property.name: testInvestigatorShouldUpdateInvestigation
property.value: InsuranceClaimsProcessingSystemApplicationTests should allow investigator to update an investigation

property.name: testInvestigatorShouldGetAllInvestigations
property.value: InsuranceClaimsProcessingSystemApplicationTests should allow investigator to retrieve all investigations

property.name: testUnderwriterShouldReviewClaim
property.value: InsuranceClaimsProcessingSystemApplicationTests should allow underwriter to review a claim

property.name: testUnderwriterShouldGetClaimsForReview
property.value: InsuranceClaimsProcessingSystemApplicationTests should allow underwriter to retrieve claims for review

property.name: testPolicyHolderApiShouldBeForbiddenForOtherUser
property.value: InsuranceClaimsProcessingSystemApplicationTests should restrict policyholder APIs for other roles

property.name: testAdjusterApiShouldBeForbiddenForOtherUser
property.value: InsuranceClaimsProcessingSystemApplicationTests should restrict adjuster APIs for other roles

property.name: testUnderwriterApiShouldBeForbiddenForOtherUser
property.value: InsuranceClaimsProcessingSystemApplicationTests should restrict underwriter APIs for other roles

property.name: testInvestigatorApiShouldBeForbiddenForOtherUser
property.value: InsuranceClaimsProcessingSystemApplicationTests should restrict investigator APIs for other roles

property.name: AssignClaimComponent_create
property.value: AssignClaimComponent should create the component

property.name: AssignClaimComponent_form_invalid_empty
property.value: AssignClaimComponent should mark form invalid when claimId and underwriterId are empty

property.name: AssignClaimComponent_form_valid
property.value: AssignClaimComponent should validate form when claimId and underwriterId are provided

property.name: CreateClaimComponent_create
property.value: CreateClaimComponent should create the component

property.name: CreateClaimComponent_form_invalid_empty
property.value: CreateClaimComponent should mark form invalid when description date and status are empty

property.name: CreateClaimComponent_form_valid
property.value: CreateClaimComponent should validate form when description date and status are provided

property.name: CreateInvestigatorComponent_create
property.value: CreateInvestigatorComponent should create the component

property.name: CreateInvestigatorComponent_form_invalid_empty
property.value: CreateInvestigatorComponent should mark form invalid when report and status are empty

property.name: CreateInvestigatorComponent_form_valid
property.value: CreateInvestigatorComponent should validate form when report and status are provided

property.name: HttpService_create
property.value: HttpService should be created

property.name: HttpService_getInvestigations
property.value: HttpService should retrieve all investigations

property.name: HttpService_getClaimsByUnderwriter
property.value: HttpService should retrieve claims by underwriter

property.name: HttpService_getClaimsByPolicyholder
property.value: HttpService should retrieve claims by policyholder

property.name: HttpService_getAllClaims
property.value: HttpService should retrieve all claims

property.name: HttpService_getAllUnderwriters
property.value: HttpService should retrieve all underwriters

property.name: HttpService_updateInvestigation
property.value: HttpService should update an investigation

property.name: HttpService_createInvestigation
property.value: HttpService should create an investigation

property.name: HttpService_createClaims
property.value: HttpService should create a claim

property.name: HttpService_updateClaims
property.value: HttpService should update a claim

property.name: HttpService_updateClaimsStatus
property.value: HttpService should update claim status

property.name: HttpService_login
property.value: HttpService should login user

property.name: HttpService_registerUser
property.value: HttpService should register a new user

property.name: LoginComponent_invalid_empty
property.value: LoginComponent should mark form invalid when username and password are empty

property.name: LoginComponent_invalid_partial
property.value: LoginComponent should mark form invalid when either username or password is empty

property.name: LoginComponent_valid
property.value: LoginComponent should validate form when username and password are provided

property.name: RegistrationComponent_invalid_empty
property.value: RegistrationComponent should mark form invalid when any field is empty

property.name: RegistrationComponent_invalid_email
property.value: RegistrationComponent should mark form invalid when email format is incorrect

property.name: RegistrationComponent_valid
property.value: RegistrationComponent should validate form when all fields are provided correctly

property.name: UpdateClaimComponent_create
property.value: UpdateClaimComponent should create the component

property.name: UpdateClaimComponent_form_invalid_empty
property.value: UpdateClaimComponent should mark form invalid when description date and status are empty
